title: botrychium lunaria var. floriferum
intro: Botrychium lunaria var. floriferum, also known as moonwort or floriferous grape fern, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and small white flowers. The medicinal properties of Botrychium lunaria var. floriferum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Traditionally, Botrychium lunaria var. floriferum has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
